jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Milton
jsonLd.description:
We at Milton are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Bhopal. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Milton:
Milton is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milton!
